text: A battery is a device that stores chemical energy and converts it into electrical energy
original_text: A battery is a device that stores chemical energy and converts it into electrical energy.

text: batteries power phones, cars, toys, tools, watches, laptops, and many portable devices
original_text: Batteries power phones, cars, toys, tools, watches, laptops, and many portable devices.

text: rechargeable batteries can be used many times by reversing chemical reactions
original_text: Rechargeable batteries can be used many times by reversing chemical reactions.

text: battery life depends on capacity, device demand, age, temperature, and chemistry
original_text: Battery life depends on capacity, device demand, age, temperature, and chemistry.
The meatball considers batteries tiny bottled lightning.
